# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover any security vulnerabilities or issues in NukeJS, please report them safely and privately so we can address them promptly.

### 📬 How to Report

Send an email to:
```
hi@kav3.com
```
Include:

- Clear description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Impact assessment (if known)
- Any proof-of-concept code

We take security reports seriously and will respond as quickly as possible.

---

## Supported Versions

We monitor and fix security issues in the latest version of NukeJS.  
Older versions may not receive security fixes.

---

## Thank You

Thank you for helping keep this project and its users safe! 🔐
